narrative:
Precinct South Zanesville (precinct in Muskingum County) has 1,039 registered voters, with 62.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
